prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete the defense corpus task that resulted in a runtime failure with identifier '3'.

tasks.description: Invoke the 'runtime_failure-capability-3' capability to process the defense corpus task and handle any runtime failure.
Ensure the input is in 'text' format before invoking the 'runtime_failure-capability-3' capability.

tasks.requirement_name: Process defense corpus task with runtime_failure-capability-3
tasks.description: Use the 'runtime_failure-capability-3' to process the defense corpus and handle any runtime failure.
Capture and log any error details returned by the 'runtime_failure-capability-3' capability during task execution.

tasks.requirement_name: Retry or resolve runtime failure using runtime_failure-capability-3
tasks.description: Attempt to retry the defense corpus task or resolve any runtime failure using the 'runtime_failure-capability-3' capability.
